name: Impossible Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Beat all ingredients together except nuts until smooth. Blend for 2 minutes on high, stopping occasionally to stir, or whisk for 2 minutes with a hand beater.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate and sprinkle with nuts.
5. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Serve with ice cream if desired.
